description: Fix a trivial arithmetic bug (a - b should be a + b) in a JavaScript module so a co-located assertion script passes.
prompt: There is a small Node.js project in this directory. The module at src/add.js exports an add(a, b) function that is implemented incorrectly. Read src/add.js and test.js, fix the implementation in src/add.js, and run `node test.js` to confirm the fix. Do not change test.js.
